hero.title: GhostDrive
hero.subtitle: Your private storage, like OneDrive
hero.description: Free and open source Windows sync client for your private storage backends. Native Files On-Demand via Cloud Filter API — end vendor lock-in, your data stays with you.
problems.title: The problem
problems.subtitle: Current solutions lock you into a closed ecosystem
problems.1.title: Vendor lock-in
problems.1.desc: Google Drive, OneDrive, iDrive — your data is held hostage on their servers. Switching providers means migrating everything manually, with proprietary formats and closed APIs.
problems.2.title: Limited and costly quota
problems.2.desc: A few free gigabytes, then monthly subscriptions for storage you already own on your NAS or home server.
problems.3.title: Private backends out of reach
problems.3.desc: You have a NAS, MooseFS, a WebDAV server, Ceph? Windows can't mount them natively with a Files On-Demand experience. Rclone is powerful but lacks a UI, placeholders, and automatic sync.
solutions.title: The GhostDrive solution
solutions.subtitle: Same experience as OneDrive, towards your own backends
solutions.1.solution: Open plugin architecture — WebDAV, MooseFS, S3, CephFS and more
solutions.2.solution: Open source, self-hosted — you control your infrastructure
solutions.3.problem: No Files On-Demand on private backends
solutions.3.solution: Native Windows Cloud Filter API — real placeholders, on-demand downloads
solutions.4.solution: Native Windows interface with system tray icon, notifications and visual settings
features.title: Features
features.subtitle: Everything OneDrive offers, towards your own storage
features.1.title: Files On-Demand
features.1.desc: Remote files appear in Windows Explorer without taking up disk space. Access them on demand — GhostDrive downloads them automatically on first access.
features.2.title: Native Cloud Filter API
features.2.desc: Deep integration with Windows via Cloud Filter API. Transparent local + remote folder merge, cloud badge ☁️ on remote files, progressive hydration in 4 MiB chunks.
features.3.title: Bidirectional sync
features.3.desc: Local changes propagate to the backend, and vice versa. Built-in conflict resolution.
features.4.title: Local cache
features.4.desc: Enable the cache to access your files offline. Automatic sync on reconnection.
features.5.title: Plugin architecture
features.5.desc: Each storage backend is a compiled Go plugin. Add WebDAV, MooseFS, S3, or implement your own via the StorageBackend interface.
features.6.title: Simple distribution
features.6.desc: A single Windows binary, no complex setup. Prerequisite: WinFsp for system-level placeholders.
roadmap.title: Roadmap
roadmap.subtitle: Each version delivers one complete, usable feature
roadmap.progress.caption: V2 — 2 out of 5 milestones delivered
roadmap.group.v1.label: V1
roadmap.group.v1.title: Sync & Backends
roadmap.group.v1.desc: Bidirectional sync, WebDAV, MooseFS, local cache — first usable release
roadmap.group.v2.label: V2
roadmap.group.v2.title: Files On-Demand & VFS
roadmap.group.v2.desc: Native Windows placeholders, progressive hydration, full workflow
roadmap.group.v3.label: V3
roadmap.group.v3.title: Multi-client & Security
roadmap.group.v3.desc: Multiple machines synced, zero-knowledge encryption, versioning
roadmap.v1x.title: V1 — Full Sync
roadmap.v1x.desc: Bidirectional sync, 2 backends (WebDAV + MooseFS), LRU local cache, Windows systray UI, dynamic gRPC plugins, virtual GhD: drive via WinFsp.
roadmap.v200.title: v2.0 — VFS Foundation
roadmap.v200.desc: Unified GhD: drive exposing all backends as subfolders, ReadAt/ChunkSize for optimized range reads.
roadmap.v210.title: v2.1 — Files On-Demand
roadmap.v210.desc: Native Cloud Filter API: CfRegisterSyncRoot, lightweight placeholders, progressive hydration in 4 MiB chunks, local + remote folder merge.
roadmap.v220.title: v2.2 — Object Workflow
roadmap.v220.desc: Native rename/move on placeholders, full copy state preservation, data-loss fixes (Delete L, Unpin L), Conflict warning dialog.
roadmap.v230.title: v2.3 — Full Bidirectional Sync
roadmap.v230.desc: Full ☁️ badges via sparse MSIX, conflict resolution UI, persistent state cache, adaptive exponential retry.
roadmap.v240.title: v2.4 — Advanced Cache & Offline
roadmap.v240.desc: Full offline mode, per-backend smart cache, opportunistic sync on reconnection.
roadmap.v300.title: Multi-client
roadmap.v300.desc: Sync multiple Windows machines to the same backend with multi-device conflict resolution.
roadmap.v310.title: Zero-knowledge encryption
roadmap.v310.desc: AES-256-GCM + Argon2id, keys in Windows Credential Manager — the backend never sees your data in plaintext.
roadmap.v320.title: File versioning
roadmap.v320.desc: Per-file version history, restore a previous version directly from the systray interface.
install.title: Installation
install.subtitle: Precompiled binaries available on GitHub Releases
install.download.title: From binary releases (recommended)
install.download.prereq: Prerequisite: WinFsp 2.0+ — required for Files On-Demand placeholders
install.source.title: From source
install.prereq.title: Prerequisites
install.note: Windows SDK ≥ 10.0.17763.0 required for Cloud Filter API.
comparison.title: Comparison
comparison.subtitle: Why GhostDrive?
footer.desc: Free Windows sync client for your private storage backends.
